funFacts: The Octopus Guarding Treasure Chest can change its skin color and texture in milliseconds to blend into its surroundings, using pigment cells called chromatophores.
The Octopus Guarding Treasure Chest is a highly intelligent problem solver, capable of opening jars, navigating mazes, and escaping aquariums.
